MINI MINUTES: Defendant BART's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered a Jury Trial date set on 5/16/2005 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206.
